content_of_post_to_answer: What are effective ways to manage stress at work for better mental health?
answer: Work stress is often managed at the symptom level, but the deeper issue is usually the gap between responsibility and control. Many people exhaust themselves trying to control outcomes, opinions, and every possible mistake. A healthier shift is asking: what deserves my energy, and what only consumes it? I've explored this pattern in more detail on my profile for those who want a deeper look. Stress reduces when we stop treating every demand as equally important.
